name: Brazil (Passion & Heroism)
culture_notes: Competitive Brotherhood: Focus on 'Clans' and 'Fighting together with friends'.
Vibrant Emotions: Characters showing extreme joy or anger. High-drama VO (Portuguese-BR).
The 'Survivor' Mentality: Thriving in chaos (very effective for Battle Royale or Zombie genres).
Local Cultural Hooks: References to 'Futebol' or local carnival-style energy where appropriate.

visual_specs.typography: Dynamic, slanted, 'Street-art' or 'Graffiti' inspired bold fonts.
visual_specs.ui_style: Focus on the 'Kill Feed' or 'Victory' banners.
visual_specs.pacing: High-octane action. Lots of camera shakes and 'Impact' effects.

preferred_bgm: Funk Carioca (for casual) or heavy Nu-Metal/Electronic (for hardcore).
focus: Action & Impact > Social Ego > Emotional Resonance
taboo: General extreme violence or severe local offenses
